briefing_zh:
今天 AI 领域最引人注目的趋势是**多智能体世界模型**的突破。**Gamma-World** 提出了超越双人场景的生成式多智能体世界建模框架，首次将交互式视频生成扩展到多角色协同场景，这对游戏、模拟和具身智能意义重大。与此同时，LeCun 团队的 **LeJEPA** 从理论层面严格证明了 JEPA 架构学习世界模型的充要条件，为自监督学习奠定了更坚实的数学基础。

在模型效率方面，**MiniMax-M2** 系列展示了仅用约 100 亿激活参数的 MoE 模型就能在 Agent 任务上媲美前沿大模型的潜力，其自进化能力和 Forge RL 系统值得关注。**Qwen3.7-Max** 的发布则直接定位 Agent 前沿，配合 DeepSeek V4 Pro 永久降价，表明行业正进入 Agent 能力的性价比竞争阶段。

一个有趣的研究方向是「LLM 睡眠」——**Do Language Models Need Sleep?** 提出离线递归机制进行记忆整合，无需增加推理延迟即可提升深度推理能力，这对长上下文理解和持续学习具有启发意义。在 Agent 自我进化方面，**MUSE-Autoskill** 提出的五阶段技能生命周期管理框架，使 Agent 能自主创建、评估和跨架构迁移技能，向真正的自主学习迈进了一步。
briefing_en:
Today's most striking trend is the breakthrough in **multi-agent world models**. **Gamma-World** proposes a generative multi-agent world modeling framework beyond two players, extending interactive video generation to multi-character collaborative scenarios—significant for gaming, simulation, and embodied intelligence. Meanwhile, LeCun's team rigorously proves the necessary and sufficient conditions for **LeJEPA** to learn a world model, establishing firmer mathematical foundations for self-supervised learning.

On model efficiency, the **MiniMax-M2** series demonstrates that MoE models with ~10B activated parameters can match frontier models on agentic tasks, with its self-evolution capabilities and Forge RL system deserving attention. The release of **Qwen3.7-Max** targeting the agent frontier, combined with DeepSeek V4 Pro's permanent price cut, signals the industry entering a cost-performance competition phase for agent capabilities.

A fascinating research direction is "LLM sleep"—**Do Language Models Need Sleep?** proposes offline recurrence for memory consolidation without increasing inference latency. In agent self-evolution, **MUSE-Autoskill**'s five-stage skill lifecycle enables agents to autonomously create, evaluate, and transfer skills across architectures, moving toward genuine autonomous learning.
viral_analysis_zh: **Gamma-World** 最有爆款潜力——多智能体世界模型直击游戏和影视行业痛点，156 个 upvotes 已证明社区热度。视频生成+多角色互动的组合极具视觉冲击力，容易在社交媒体传播。「LLM 需要睡觉吗？」这个拟人化标题也极具传播力，2400+ 浏览量说明话题本身就有破圈能力。
viral_analysis_en: **Gamma-World** has the highest viral potential—multi-agent world modeling hits a direct pain point for gaming and media, with 156 upvotes already proving community excitement. The combination of video generation + multi-character interaction creates visual impact that spreads easily on social media. "Do Language Models Need Sleep?" with its anthropomorphic framing also has strong breakout appeal, with 2400+ views confirming the topic's inherent virality.

huggingface_papers.title: Gamma-World: Generative Multi-Agent World Modeling Beyond Two Players
huggingface_papers.tldr: First framework for generative multi-agent world modeling beyond two-player settings. Generates interactive video with multiple controllable characters, enabling complex multi-agent scenarios for gaming, simulation, and embodied AI research.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 首个超越双人场景的生成式多智能体世界建模框架。可生成具有多个可控角色的交互式视频，适用于游戏、模拟和具身AI研究中的复杂多智能体场景。
huggingface_papers.authors: Fangfu Liu, Kai He, Tianchang Shen

huggingface_papers.title: ProRL: Effective Reinforcement Learning for Proactive Recommendation via Rectified Policy Gradient Estimation
huggingface_papers.tldr: Introduces rectified policy gradient estimation for proactive recommender systems that guide user preferences toward target items. Addresses high variance in RL-based recommendation by leveraging path structure for more stable training.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出用于主动推荐系统的修正策略梯度估计方法，通过引导用户偏好转向目标商品实现主动推荐。利用路径结构解决RL推荐中的高方差问题，训练更稳定。
huggingface_papers.authors: Hongru Hou, Tiehua Mei, Denghui Geng

huggingface_papers.title: Agent Explorative Policy Optimization for Multimodal Agentic Reasoning
huggingface_papers.tldr: Proposes explorative policy optimization for vision-language models performing agentic reasoning with external tools. Addresses the gap where internal reasoning alone cannot resolve real-world problems requiring tool use and multi-step interaction.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出针对视觉语言模型的探索性策略优化方法，使其能通过外部工具进行智能体推理。解决了仅靠内部推理无法处理需要工具使用和多步交互的现实问题。
huggingface_papers.authors: Minki Kang, Shizhe Diao, Ryo Hachiuma

huggingface_papers.title: From Pixels to Words -- Towards Native One-Vision Models at Scale
huggingface_papers.tldr: Proposes native one-vision models that unify image encoding and language decoding without multi-stage alignment. Eliminates the fragmented pipeline of separate encoders/decoders, achieving end-to-end pixel-to-language understanding at scale.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出原生统一视觉模型，无需多阶段对齐即可统一图像编码与语言解码。消除了分离编码器/解码器的碎片化流水线，实现端到端的大规模像素到语言理解。
huggingface_papers.authors: Haiwen Diao, Jiahao Wang, Penghao Wu

huggingface_papers.title: Self-Improving Language Models with Bidirectional Evolutionary Search
huggingface_papers.tldr: Introduces bidirectional evolutionary search for self-improving language models and agentic systems. Improves over beam search and MCTS by exploring both forward and backward directions, yielding better training samples and inference-time results.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出双向进化搜索实现语言模型自我改进。相比束搜索和MCTS，通过同时探索正向和反向方向，产生更好的训练样本和推理结果，适用于后训练和推理时增强。
huggingface_papers.authors: Guowei Xu, Zhenting Qi, Huangyuan Su

alphaxiv_papers.title: Do Language Models Need Sleep? Offline Recurrence for Improved Online Inference
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Proposes an 'LLM sleep' mechanism where Transformers with fast-weight memories perform offline recurrent passes for memory consolidation. Improves deep reasoning on evicted context without increasing inference latency, tested on cellular automata and math reasoning.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 提出「LLM睡眠」机制，让具有快速权重记忆的Transformer进行离线递归来整合记忆。无需增加推理延迟即可提升对已逐出上下文的深度推理能力，在细胞自动机和数学推理上验证有效。

alphaxiv_papers.title: When Does LeJEPA Learn a World Model?
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Formally proves that LeJEPA achieves linear identifiability (learns a world model) if and only if latent variables follow isotropic Gaussian distribution. Establishes theoretical foundation for JEPA-based latent-space planning.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 严格证明 LeJEPA 当且仅当隐变量服从各向同性高斯分布时才能实现线性可辨识性（学习世界模型）。为基于JEPA的隐空间规划奠定理论基础。

alphaxiv_papers.title: The MiniMax-M2 Series: Mini Activations Unleashing Max Real-World Intelligence
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: MoE model family with ~10B activated parameters matching frontier models on agentic tasks. Features agent-driven data pipelines, Forge RL system for scalable reinforcement learning, and early self-evolution capabilities.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 约100亿激活参数的MoE模型系列，在Agent任务上媲美前沿模型。集成Agent驱动的数据管线、可扩展RL系统Forge，以及早期自进化能力。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Google's native multimodal embedding model creating unified vectors for video, audio, image, and text. Achieves SOTA on multimodal retrieval with 77.2 global mean score, outperforming ASR-based baselines by +3.59 mrr@10 on audio.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Google原生多模态嵌入模型，为视频、音频、图像和文本创建统一向量表示。多模态检索SOTA，全局均分77.2，音频理解超越ASR基线+3.59 mrr@10。

alphaxiv_papers.title: MUSE-Autoskill: Self-Evolving Agents via Skill Creation, Memory, Management, and Evaluation
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Comprehensive agent framework for autonomous skill lifecycle management—creation, storage, evaluation, refinement, and cross-architecture transfer. Achieves 7.16pp accuracy improvement with self-generated skills and 10.51pp when transferring to different agents.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 全面的Agent技能生命周期自主管理框架——创建、存储、评估、精炼和跨架构迁移。自生成技能提升准确率7.16个百分点，跨Agent迁移提升10.51个百分点。

github_repos.name: study8677/awesome-architecture
github_repos.tldr: Curated collection of 21 software architecture maps including AI gateway, RAG pipelines, and agent systems. Visual-first approach to teaching architectural thinking patterns for modern AI-integrated systems.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 精选21张软件架构图谱，涵盖AI网关、RAG管线和Agent系统。以可视化方式教授现代AI集成系统的架构思维模式。

github_repos.name: UditAkhourii/adhd
github_repos.tldr: A skill module for coding agents implementing tree-of-thought with pruning, built on Claude Agent SDK. Enhances agent focus and reasoning quality by structuring exploration and eliminating dead-end reasoning paths.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 基于Claude Agent SDK的编码智能体技能模块，实现带剪枝的思维树。通过结构化探索和消除死胡同推理路径来提升Agent专注力和推理质量。

github_repos.name: bryanyzhu/agentic-ai-system-course
github_repos.tldr: A skeleton course teaching how to design, build, and operate production AI agent systems. Uses an agent-teaches-agent approach where the learning environment itself is agent-powered.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 教授如何设计、构建和运维生产级AI Agent系统的骨架课程。采用Agent教Agent的方式，学习环境本身由Agent驱动。

github_repos.name: withkynam/vibecode-pro-max-kit
github_repos.tldr: Spec-driven coding harness for AI-assisted development that maintains project context when AI forgets. Designed for vibecoders and product owners who need persistent memory across coding sessions.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 规格驱动的AI辅助开发工具，在AI遗忘时维持项目上下文。为需要跨编码会话持久记忆的vibe coder和产品负责人设计。

github_repos.name: mikaeldengale-cloud/Deepseek-v4-Pro-App
github_repos.tldr: Open-source Windows 11 desktop client for DeepSeek V4 Flash Pro chat API. Provides native desktop experience for accessing DeepSeek's latest model with full API integration.
github_repos.tldr_zh: DeepSeek V4 Flash Pro聊天API的开源Windows 11桌面客户端。提供原生桌面体验以访问DeepSeek最新模型。

hackernews.title: Qwen3.7-Max: The Agent Frontier
hackernews.tldr: Alibaba's Qwen team releases Qwen3.7-Max targeting the agent capability frontier. Represents a major push by Chinese AI labs into the agent-first model paradigm, competing directly with Claude and GPT on tool use and multi-step reasoning.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 阿里Qwen团队发布Qwen3.7-Max，定位Agent能力前沿。标志中国AI实验室全面进入Agent优先的模型范式，在工具使用和多步推理上直接对标Claude和GPT。

hackernews.title: DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent
hackernews.tldr: DeepSeek permanently reduces V4 Pro API pricing, signaling aggressive cost competition in the frontier model market. This move pressures all API providers and accelerates commoditization of high-capability inference.
hackernews.tldr_zh: DeepSeek将V4 Pro API永久降价，在前沿模型市场发出激进价格竞争信号。此举对所有API提供商形成压力，加速高能力推理的商品化进程。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Continue? Y/N: A 60-second game about AI agent permission fatigue
hackernews.tldr: A satirical 60-second browser game highlighting the UX problem of AI agent permission prompts. Gamifies the frustration of constant Y/N confirmations, sparking discussion about better agent autonomy models.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 一款讽刺性60秒浏览器游戏，揭示AI Agent权限弹窗的UX问题。将不断确认Y/N的挫败感游戏化，引发关于更好的Agent自主性模型的讨论。

hackernews.title: Microsoft reports AI is more expensive than paying human employees
hackernews.tldr: Microsoft internal analysis reveals AI agent deployment costs exceed human employee costs for many tasks. Raises questions about the near-term ROI of enterprise agent adoption and the token economics of complex agentic workflows.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 微软内部分析显示许多任务中AI Agent部署成本超过人工成本。引发对企业Agent采用的近期ROI和复杂Agent工作流token经济学的质疑。

hackernews.title: Formal Verification Gates for AI Coding Loops
hackernews.tldr: Proposes formal verification as structural backpressure for AI coding agents rather than making agents smarter. Demonstrates that verification gates in the loop produce more reliable code than unconstrained agent iteration.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 提出用形式验证作为AI编码Agent的结构性反压，而非让Agent更聪明。证明循环中的验证门比无约束Agent迭代产生更可靠的代码。
